summary: Accepted image145844_reimage_r03 as the first magnetic-field-aligned candidate based on completed raw/readout-aware strong-pi pODMR: clear resonance at the 3.875 GHz grid point, about 16.6% raw signal drop vs edge median, all 4 averages support center drop, and no drift-flagged averages. Authored model/advisory-backed weak-pi pODMR intent, verified hard queue/safety gates, and submitted the weak-pi frequency calibration. The bridge is now running job nv23_pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1_20260513_180419_pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1, scanning 3.865..3.885 GHz in 21 points with 4 x 50000 repetitions, mod_depth=0.1, length_rabi_pulse=0.57 us. Project state, note, lab log, and evidence index were updated.
next_action: Wait for the running weak-pi pODMR bridge job to reach terminal state; then copy terminal artifacts, complete intent image145844_reimage_r03_weak_podmr_20260513_1753, raw-export and review readouts/drift/normalizations before using any refined center for Ramsey/T2star.
